instruction: Open Calendar and create an all-day event titled {EVENT} on the calendar named Work for next Monday.
source: cove-original (design 047 §10 Calendar template); Tier-C AppleScript reads the event summary back from the Work calendar

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar"' -e 'if not (exists calendar "Work") then make new calendar with properties {name:"Work"}' -e 'tell calendar "Work" to delete (every event whose summary is "{EVENT}")' -e 'end tell' 2>/dev/null || true

osascript -e 'set d to (current date)' -e 'tell application "Calendar" to tell calendar "Work" to make new event with properties {summary:"{EVENT}", start date:d, end date:d, allday event:true}' 2>/dev/null || true
